creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->feedback

To submitter:  I'm afraid that the image you put up on Rapidshare is 
no longer available, is there any chance you could upload it again 
somewhere that won't expire?  Also, please recompile your kernel with 
"options DDB", "options KDB" and "makeoptions DEBUG=-g", recreate 
the crash, and enter "bt" at the prompt so that we can see where exactly 
the panic is happening.  Thanks!
